title: Debug and fix non-functional application deployment

requirements.text: Investigate and identify why the application is not working in the deployed environment, checking for runtime errors, failed network requests, authentication issues, or broken component rendering in the browser console and network tab
acceptanceCriteria: Browser console shows no critical JavaScript errors
Network tab shows successful responses from backend canister
Application loads and displays the main interface without blank screens or crashes

requirements.text: Fix any identified issues preventing the application from functioning, including backend canister initialization errors, frontend build configuration problems, or authentication flow breakages
acceptanceCriteria: All core features (timer, authentication, chapter management) are operational
Users can successfully log in using Internet Identity
Data persistence works correctly between sessions
UI components render properly with the warm earthy theme

requirements.text: Verify that the backend main.mo actor compiles without errors and all public methods are accessible from the frontend
acceptanceCriteria: Backend canister deploys successfully without compilation errors
All actor methods respond to frontend requests

requirements.text: Ensure the frontend builds successfully with all components properly imported and the useActor hook correctly connects to the backend canister
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend production build completes without errors
React Query client connects to backend actor

constraints: Preserve existing data structures and persistent storage Maps
nonGoals: Redesigning the UI or changing the visual theme
